log: === ROUND 1 ===
--- Minotaur — Bardic Musician's turn ---
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 16 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:8+3=11 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:14+-2=12 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:5+-2=3 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 3/3 targets affected.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
=== ROUND 2 ===

→ ⚠ Ogre: Charm broken by damage! No longer incapacitated.
Frost Giant is incapacitated — skipping turn.
Ogre is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Ogre's turn ---
Ogre attacks Minotaur — Bardic Musician with Greatclub: [d20:17+6=23 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Minotaur — Bardic Musician HP: 56/67
=== ROUND 3 ===

=== ROUND 5 ===

→ Minotaur — Bardic Musician healed for 8 HP. HP: 39/67
--- Frost Giant's turn ---

→ Minotaur — Bardic Musician loses concentration on Hold Person! [CON save 6 vs DC 19]
Frost Giant attacks Minotaur — Bardic Musician with Greataxe: [d20:12+9=21 vs AC 14] HIT! 11 damage. Minotaur — Bardic Musician HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 5 rounds ===
